DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF OPPOSITION TO MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT TSE, AGNES

LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO CARRY BURDEN OF PROVING CONTRACTUAL RELATIONSHIP WITH DEFENDANT AND EVEN IF PLAINTIFF HAS CARRIED THAT BURDEN, DEFENDANT HAS RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUES OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO RESPONSIBILITY FOR THE ACCOUNT. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-28-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES- AGNES TSE, TEL. NO. 753-5621, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCE ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS - PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO CARRY BURDEN OF PROVING CONTRACTUAL RELATIONSHIP WITH DEFENDANT AND EVEN IF PLAINTIFF HAS CARRIED THAT BURDEN, DEFENDANT HAS RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUES OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO RESPONSIBILITY FOR THE ACCOUNT. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =(301/PJB/JF)
